ssc.label: SSC CGL / CHSL
ssc.desc: Staff Selection Commission — CGL Tier I & II, CHSL

cards.tags: pronouns personal possessive reflexive relative demonstrative distributive ready tier2
cards.title: Pronouns
cards.desc: All 8 types: Personal, Possessive, Reflexive, Reciprocal, Relative, Demonstrative, Distributive & Indefinite. Includes Who/Whom trap, 231 order rule, faulty comparison fix.

cards.title: Nouns
cards.desc: Proper, Common, Collective, Abstract, Material nouns. Singular-Plural traps: Data/Datum, Criteria/Criterion. Countable vs uncountable.

cards.title: Tenses & Verbs
cards.desc: All 12 tenses, Subject-Verb Agreement (SVA), irregular verbs list. Modal verbs. Sequence of tenses.

cards.title: Articles (A / An / The)
cards.desc: Definite vs Indefinite. Zero article rules. "An hour" vs "A hour" — phonetic rule. The most tested grammar topic.

cards.tags: active passive voice grammar soon tier2
cards.title: Active & Passive Voice
cards.desc: Conversion formulas for all 12 tenses. Modals in passive. Impersonal passives. SSC sentence improvement patterns.

cards.tags: narration direct indirect grammar soon tier2
cards.title: Direct & Indirect Narration
cards.desc: Reporting verb changes. Tense backshift rules. Pronoun changes in indirect speech. Universal truths exception.

cards.title: Synonyms & Antonyms
cards.desc: 500+ high-frequency words. Root-word expansion (Latin/Greek roots). Confusable pairs. SSC CGL 2018–2025 word bank.

cards.title: One-Word Substitution
cards.desc: Themed categories: people by profession, phobias, manias, government types. 200+ PYQ one-words from CGL/CHSL 2018–2025.

cards.title: Idioms & Phrasal Verbs
cards.desc: 150+ idioms grouped by theme. Phrasal verbs with all particles. SSC's most repeated idiom list.

cards.title: Spelling Correction
cards.desc: 100 most misspelled words in SSC. Silent letters. Double consonant rules. -ei vs -ie words.

cards.title: Reading Comprehension
cards.desc: Speed-reading strategies. Question type identification. Cloze test approach. Para-jumble solving. Tone & mood.

cards.tags: percentage profit loss discount arithmetic soon
cards.title: Percentage & Profit-Loss
cards.desc: Percentage change formula. Profit, Loss, Discount tricks. Successive discount. CP/SP/MP relations. SSC favourite shortcut methods.

cards.tags: speed time distance work arithmetic soon
cards.title: Speed, Time & Work
cards.desc: Relative speed. Trains, Boats & Streams. Work & Wages. Pipes & Cisterns. Efficiency method.

cards.tags: ratio proportion average mixture arithmetic soon tier2
cards.title: Ratio, Average & Mixture
cards.desc: Ratio & Proportion. Alligation / Mixture. Average tricks. Weighted average. Partnership problems.

cards.title: Geometry
cards.desc: Triangle properties, similarity, congruence. Circle theorems. Tangent-secant rules. Area & perimeter shortcuts.

cards.title: Trigonometry & Algebra
cards.desc: Sin/Cos/Tan table. Complementary angle identities. Algebraic identities. Linear equations. Quadratic shortcuts.

cards.title: Analogy & Classification
cards.desc: Word analogy types. Number analogy. Letter analogy. Odd one out patterns. SSC CGL favourites.

cards.title: Series (Number & Letter)
cards.desc: Number series patterns: difference, ratio, prime, squares. Letter series. Mixed series shortcuts.

cards.tags: mirror image paper folding reasoning soon
cards.title: Mirror Image & Paper Folding
cards.desc: Mirror images of figures, clocks. Water image rules. Paper folding & cutting patterns. Embedded figures.

cards.tags: indus valley civilization live questions ready
cards.title: Indus Valley Civilization Live Questions - I
cards.desc: Practice live questions on Harappan civilisation covering discovery, major sites, town planning, drainage system, seals, script, trade, and important TNPSC/SSC exam patterns.

cards.tags: indus valley civilization advanced live questions ready
cards.title: Indus Valley Civilization Live Questions - II
cards.desc: Advanced practice questions on Harappan culture including economy, religion, agriculture, important artefacts, Lothal dockyard, Dholavira, Mohenjo-daro, and tricky exam-oriented questions.

cards.title: Ancient India
cards.desc: Indus Valley Civilisation, Vedic Age, Mauryas, Guptas. Key dynasties timeline. Important rulers & their contributions.

cards.title: Medieval India
cards.desc: Delhi Sultanate, Mughal Empire, Bhakti & Sufi movements, Vijayanagara. Key battles & treaties.

cards.title: Modern India & Freedom
cards.desc: British entry to independence. 1857 Revolt, Congress, Gandhi era. Partition. Governors-General list.

cards.title: World Geography
cards.desc: Continents, Oceans, Rivers, Mountains. Time zones, Latitudes & Longitudes. Climatic zones. Important straits & passes.

cards.title: Indian Geography
cards.desc: Physical divisions of India. Rivers, Dams, Lakes. Soils, Crops, Minerals. National Parks & Sanctuaries.

cards.title: Indian Constitution
cards.desc: Preamble, Fundamental Rights, DPSPs, Fundamental Duties. Articles & Schedule quick reference table.

cards.tags: polity live qa revision constitution articles ready
cards.title: Polity Live QA Revision
cards.desc: Live question-answer revision on Indian Polity covering Constitution, Preamble, Fundamental Rights, DPSPs, Fundamental Duties, Parliament, President, Judiciary, Articles, Amendments, and exam-tricky concepts.

cards.title: Chemistry Basics
cards.desc: Periodic table groups, Chemical formulae, Acids & Bases, pH scale, Common compounds. Reactions types.

cards.title: Physics Basics
cards.desc: Laws of Motion, Work-Energy, Optics, Sound, Electricity, Magnetism. SI units & conversions cheat sheet.

cards.title: Biology Basics
cards.desc: Cell structure, Human body systems, Diseases, Vitamins & deficiencies, Plant kingdom. Nutrition quick table.

cards.title: எழுத்தியல் (Phonology)
cards.desc: உயிர் எழுத்து, மெய் எழுத்து, உயிர்மெய். Vowels, Consonants, Compound letters. Sandhi rules (புணர்ச்சி). TNPSC trap questions.

cards.title: சொல்லியல் (Morphology)
cards.desc: பெயர்ச்சொல், வினைச்சொல். Noun & Verb forms. Case suffixes (வேற்றுமை உருபுகள்). Singular-plural in Tamil.

cards.title: தொல்காப்பியம் (Tolkappiyam)
cards.desc: Ezhuttatikaram, Collatikaram, Porulatikaram overview. Key sutras. Literary significance. TNPSC direct questions.

cards.title: Sangam Literature
cards.desc: Ettuthokai, Pathupattu, Five Landscapes (Tinai). Akam & Puram poetry. Key poets: Avvaiyar, Tiruvalluvar.

cards.title: திருக்குறள் (Thirukkural)
cards.desc: 1330 Kurals in 133 chapters. Arattuppal, Porutpal, Kamattupal. Frequently quoted Kurals in TNPSC. Valluvar biography.

cards.tags: indus valley civilization live questions ready
cards.title: Indus Valley Civilization Live Questions - I
cards.desc: Practice live questions on Harappan civilisation covering discovery, major sites, town planning, drainage system, seals, script, trade, and important TNPSC/SSC exam patterns.

cards.tags: indus valley civilization advanced live questions ready
cards.title: Indus Valley Civilization Live Questions - II
cards.desc: Advanced practice questions on Harappan culture including economy, religion, agriculture, important artefacts, Lothal dockyard, Dholavira, Mohenjo-daro, and tricky exam-oriented questions.

cards.title: Tamil Nadu History
cards.desc: Chola, Pandya, Chera, Pallava dynasties. Nayak rulers, British entry to TN. Major temples & inscriptions.

cards.title: Freedom Struggle — TN Focus
cards.desc: Veerapandiya Kattabomman, Maruthu Pandiyar, V.O. Chidambaram. INC sessions in TN. Important revolts.

cards.tags: tnpsc current affairs live questions revision ready
cards.title: Current Affairs Live QA
cards.desc: Rapid live revision for TNPSC covering national & international current affairs, schemes, appointments, awards, important days, reports, economy, science, sports, Tamil Nadu updates, and previous year exam patterns.

cards.tags: polity live qa revision constitution articles ready
cards.title: Polity Live QA Revision
cards.desc: Live question-answer revision on Indian Polity covering Constitution, Preamble, Fundamental Rights, DPSPs, Fundamental Duties, Parliament, President, Judiciary, Articles, Amendments, and exam-tricky concepts.

cards.title: Indian Constitution
cards.desc: Preamble, Fundamental Rights, DPSPs, Fundamental Duties. Articles reference table. Amendments. Schedules.

cards.title: Local Self-Government
cards.desc: 73rd & 74th Amendments. Panchayati Raj structure. Urban Local Bodies. TN specific — Municipality & Corporation facts.

cards.title: Indian Economy Basics
cards.desc: National income concepts (GDP, GNP, NNP). Five Year Plans / NITI Aayog. Budget basics. Inflation types.

cards.title: TN Agriculture & Economy
cards.desc: Major crops, soils, irrigation projects. TN river basins. Major industries in TN. MSME and export commodities.

cards.title: Science in Everyday Life
cards.desc: Nutrition & Health. Common diseases & prevention. IT basics. Space missions (ISRO). Defence technology.

cards.title: Ecology & Biodiversity
cards.desc: Ecosystem types, Food chains. Biodiversity hotspots in India. Conservation laws. Wildlife Protection Act. TN sanctuaries.

cards.tags: number system lcm hcf arithmetic soon
cards.title: Number System & LCM/HCF
cards.desc: Divisibility rules, HCF & LCM methods, Remainders. Prime factorisation. TNPSC shortcut tricks for 2 & 3 mark questions.

cards.title: Percentage & Profit-Loss
cards.desc: Profit, Loss, Discount. Percentage change. Compound interest vs Simple interest. TNPSC pattern questions.

cards.title: Analogy, Series & Coding
cards.desc: Number & letter analogy. Series completion. Coding-decoding rules. Direction sense. Blood relations.
